headline: Goldman Sachs Loves 3 Strong Buy Natural Gas Energy Stocks
summary: Founded in 1869, Goldman Sachs is the world’s second-largest investment bank by revenue and is ranked 55th on the Fortune 500 list of the largest United States corporations by total revenue. The Wall Street white-glove giant offers financing, advisory services, risk distribution, and hedging for the firm’s institutional and corporate clients. Goldman Sachs is the ... headline: CNBC Daily Open: Iran vows 'eye-for-eye' in energy attack escalation
